competitor_changes: built-in time tracking with weekly timesheet submission and manager approval
budget tracking per engagement with burn rate alerts
current_tool_status: Partial resolution of Gantt chart view auto-update issue: auto-update now available on dependency changes, but still requires manual refresh on project reload
Partial resolution of resource capacity planning: utilisation tracking available, but still requires manual setup and management in spreadsheets
compliance_changes: SOC 2 Type 2 certification updated to include new audit log feature
notes: Competitor has closed the gap in key areas, but TaskBridge still offers a strong template library and board view adoption
